strategy: Don't chip at her. Every instance of damage she takes triggers a Spirit Armor, so poking just wraps her in absorbs.
Set up clean: stack Death blades (she takes +20% Death and resists Life 50%) without hitting her at all.
Watch her partner — whenever Claudas uses a blade, Brulee casts Guidance, buffing enemy accuracy. Nothing to counter, just expect fewer fizzles from their side.
Kill her in one buffed Death hit. At 2,720 health, one blade-and-Feint hit blows through any armor she has before she can restack it.
cheatNotes: Whenever Claudas casts a blade, Brulee follows with Guidance. It just makes the enemy team more accurate — no direct counter needed.
Every time she takes damage she casts Spirit Armor on herself. Multi-hit chip damage is the worst thing you can do; one big single hit gives her no chance to armor up behind it.
